title: Mobility
description: Wall -Climbing, -Sliding, -Running and -Jumping. All without any extra keys.
body:
## **Adds:** 
Wall -Climbing, -Sliding, -Running and -Jumping without any extra keys.

_See Gallery for examples._


## **Controlls:**
space + nothing = wall slide

space + forward = wall climb

space + forward + looking along the wall = Wall running

Any of the above + looking away from the wall + letting go of space = wall jumping

Holding shift will let you hang onto a wall




## **Quality of Life features:**

Coyote Time: lets you jump a few miliseconds after leaving the ground.

Smooth jump: Allows you to jump onto a block even when you feet slightly touch the edge. This 

also allows you to jump onto fences.

Always Sprint: no more need to ever press the sprint button (better than togglesprint).




## **Configurability:**

**By default the mod does not change any gameplay.** You choose which features to use.

All parts are fully configurable.

Also adds configuration options for other movement mechanics.

You can alter the jump height, jump distance, the walking speed, the sprinting speed, and much more.
